title: periboea gawleri
intro: Periboea gawleri, also known as the Devil's Claw, is a plant species that belongs to the family Pedaliaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving compounds. The health benefits of Periboea gawleri include reducing inflammation and pain in conditions such as arthritis and other musculoskeletal disorders, as well as aiding in digestion and relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Periboea gawleri include capsules, tablets, and teas, and it is also sometimes used topically to relieve skin irritations and joint pain.
